    • Moderated mediation with `pathXMY()`: the speeding EXSJT

Toggleable widget for expectation vs valuation route diagrams

Source: R/plotPathXMY_routes.R
plotPathXMY_widget_routes.Rd

Renders the two plotPathXMY_routes panels as a self-contained HTML widget with Back and Forward buttons that swap them in place at pixel-identical layout, so the green arm slides from left (expectation) to right (valuation) and the eye picks up which mediator carries which route. Sibling of plotPathXMY_widget; both share the same toggle plumbing.

Usage

plotPathXMY_widget_routes(
  x,
  mediator = NULL,
  Z_label = "Z",
  panel_titles = NULL,
  width = 9,
  height = NULL,
  res = 192,
  format = c("png", "svg"),
  ...
)

Arguments

x

A pathXMY or pathXMY_decompose return.

mediator, X_label, Y_label, Z_label, M_labels, X_shape, Y_shape, digits, scale_max, score_intensity_max, ...

Passed through to plotPathXMY.

panel_titles

Optional length-2 character vector. If NULL, titles are auto-generated from Z_label.

width, height

Frame width and height in inches. height defaults to 3.5 for the single-mediator triangle view and to 3 + 0.5 * n_mediators for the fan view.

res

PNG resolution in pixels per inch. Default 192. Ignored when format = "svg".

format

One of "png" (default) or "svg". SVG is recommended for HTML vignette output.

Value

An htmltools::tagList object that auto-renders as an interactive HTML widget in knitr / R Markdown.

See also

plotPathXMY_routes, plotPathXMY_widget
